name: PACER (20m Shuttle Run)
description: Run back and forth across a 20-meter space at an increasing pace.

name: One-Mile Run
description: Run one mile (1609m) as fast as possible.

name: Push-Up
description: Complete as many as possible at a steady cadence.

name: Trunk Lift
description: Lift upper body off the floor using back muscles (max 12 inches).

name: YMCA Cycle Ergometer
description: Submaximal cycle test to estimate VO2 max based on heart rate response.

name: 3-Minute Step Test
description: Step on and off a 16.25 inch box for 3 mins; measure 1-minute recovery heart rate.

name: 1.5-Mile Run
description: Run 1.5 miles as fast as possible on a flat measured course.

name: YMCA Bench Press
description: Perform max reps of bench press at 80 lbs (men) or 35 lbs (women) at 30 reps/min.

name: Pull-Up
description: Perform as many strict overhand pull-ups as possible from a dead hang.

name: Flexed-Arm Hang
description: Hold chin above the pull-up bar using an overhand grip for as long as possible.

name: Plank Hold
description: Hold a forearm plank with proper spinal alignment for maximum time.

name: 1RM Bench Press
description: Determine the maximum weight lifted for one repetition on the barbell bench press.

name: 1RM Squat
description: Determine the maximum weight lifted for one repetition on the barbell back squat.

name: Handgrip Strength
description: Measure isometric grip strength using a handgrip dynamometer.

name: YMCA Sit-and-Reach
description: Measure hamstring and lower back flexibility using a yardstick placed on the floor.

name: Zipper Stretch (Shoulder)
description: Measure shoulder flexibility by reaching hands behind the back to touch.

name: Skinfold (3-Site)
description: Measure sum of 3 skinfold sites using calipers to estimate body fat percentage.

name: Waist Circumference
description: Measure circumference at the narrowest part of the torso to assess health risk.

name: T-Test
description: Sprint and shuffle through a T-shaped cone course as fast as possible.

name: Pro Agility (5-10-5)
description: Sprint 5 yards right
inputParadigm: and 5 yards right through a linear course.
